_source: docs/PLAN/PARITY-TARGETS.md §A (Schedule Quality) + §B (DCMA-14) + §C (baseline compliance / HSD) + §E (Schedule-Network change). Acumen Fuse exports for the non-CUI commercial-construction sample (ADR-0003/0005).

_deltas.DCMA06_high_float: engine computes 43 (P2) / 40 (P5); Acumen golden is 44 / 41 (+1). One near-status activity per project carries MS Project's progress-aware total float > 44d while the pure-logic CPM gives <= 44d. Pass/fail (>>5%) unaffected. ADR-0012; tracked to zero at M9.
_deltas.baseline_start_compliance: engine computes started-on-time / forecast-to-be-started = 38% (P2) / 23% (P5); Acumen golden is 41% / 25%. Denominator quirk (recon found 11/27 = 41% for P2); the underlying counts are exact. ADR-0013; tracked to zero at M9.
_deltas.SN01_total_activities: engine reports 126 (schedulable / non-summary activities, the population used by every other framework here); Acumen's §E header counts all 144 task rows (incl. 18 WBS summaries; excl. the single project-summary root). Headline-only; the forensic change counts are unaffected. ADR-0013.
_deltas.SN04_no_longer_critical: engine computes 0; Acumen golden is 1. Critical transition depends on MS Project's progress-aware Critical flag (same root cause as DCMA06). ADR-0013; tracked to zero at M9.
_deltas.SN06_start_date_slips: engine computes 9; Acumen golden is 10 (+1) — per-snapshot start-slip granularity. ADR-0013; tracked to zero at M9.
_deltas.SN07_remaining_duration_increases: engine computes 7; Acumen golden is 8 (+1). ADR-0013; tracked to zero at M9.
_deltas.SN09_float_erosion: engine computes 4 (pure-logic CPM total-float decreases); Acumen golden is 6 (MS Project progress-aware total slack). Same root cause as DCMA06. ADR-0013; tracked to zero at M9.

_scores_deferred.note: Acumen composite scores use a proprietary Bad/Neutral/Good weighting not published in the exports or the Acumen 8.11 metric guide. Per-check counts/pass-fail are reproduced exactly; the composite scores are an M9 calibration item (ADR-0012).

cei._note: Single-schedule EVM CEI (engine/metrics/evm.py). CEI(Finish)=completed_on_time/forecast_to_be_finished (= Baseline Finish Compliance). CEI(Start)=started_on_time/forecast_to_be_started (= Acumen 'Started On Time' %, 38/23). Baseline Start Compliance (41) is DISTINCT — its Half-Step-Delay numerator compares actual start to baseline FINISH (ADR-0083, residual resolved).

Single-schedule EVM CEI (engine/metrics/evm.py). CEI(Finish)=completed_on_time/forecast_to_be_finished (= Baseline Finish Compliance). CEI(Start)=started_on_time/forecast_to_be_started (= Acumen 'Started On Time' %, 38/23). Baseline Start Compliance (25) is DISTINCT — its Half-Step-Delay numerator compares actual start to baseline FINISH (ADR-0083, residual resolved).

change_P2_to_P5._comparison: Project5 (current) vs Project2 (prior) — Acumen §E PP & Change, matched by UniqueID.

bow_wave_cei._note: Pairwise, forecast-anchored Bow-Wave CEI (engine/bow_wave.py, /cei view). P2 is the first snapshot (no prior → null). For the P5 snapshot, P2's status month is May-26 so the CEI period is Jun-26: P2 forecast 3 finishes into Jun-26, all 3 actually finished by end of Jun-26 → CEI 1.00. Distinct from the single-schedule EVM CEI above (re-verified ADR-0052).
